headline: Incredible Health's AI Voice Agent Lyn Now Integrates With the Healthcare Industry’s Applicant Tracking Systems, including Workday, Interviewing 100% of Candidates 24/7
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, March 18, 2026--Incredible Health, the largest AI company powering healthcare hiring, today announced that Lyn, its AI interview voice agent purpose-built for healthcare employers and workers, integrates directly with a wide range of applicant tracking systems (ATS), transforming static candidate databases into active, always-on hiring engines.
